summary: Comprehensive testing of SnapRoad new features: Orion AI Coach backend (GPT-5.2), Partner Portal V2 APIs, and Frontend UI. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend Partner Portal fully functional. Driver login and map view working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: OrionCoach component exists but no visible trigger button in mobile UI to open it
PhotoCapture component exists but no visible trigger button in mobile UI to open it

issues: Console warning about chart dimensions (-1 width/height) - cosmetic only, charts render after mount
Minor console warning: 'The tag <icon> is unrecognized' - recharts internal issue

action_items: Add trigger buttons in MapScreen.tsx to open Orion AI Coach (floating AI button)
Add trigger button in MapScreen.tsx to open Photo Capture (camera/report incident button)
Consider adding Orion AI quick access from bottom navigation
critical_code_review_comments: Orion AI backend integration with GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM is working correctly
Partner Portal V2 APIs fully functional with authentication, team management, referrals ($5 credit system), analytics
WebSocket endpoints for real-time notifications are configured but require client-side testing
Photo analysis endpoint exists but requires actual image to test AI detection
OrionCoach.tsx and PhotoCapture.tsx components are fully implemented but lack UI triggers to open them

success_rate.frontend: 95% - Partner Portal, Driver login, Map view all working. Missing UI triggers for Orion/PhotoCapture

seed_data_creation: Partner data stored in-memory (resets on backend restart)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working: Orion chat (GPT-5.2 real integration), Partner auth, Team, Referrals ($5 credits), Analytics, QR Redemption. Partner Portal UI fully functional via sidebar navigation. Driver mobile app shows Map with nearby offers, Profile with analytics. OrionCoach and PhotoCapture components exist but need trigger buttons added to MapScreen.tsx. WebSocket at /ws/partner/{partner_id} ready for real-time notifications.
mocked_data_note: PARTNER DATA IS MOCKED in-memory storage - will reset on backend restart. Orion AI uses REAL GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM integration.
